rationale: Prior attempt asserted ensures-derived facts (e.g. `r1.0 == target_l2_p`) at the top of the proof body, but those conjuncts are part of the antecedent of the implication-shaped ensures `A ==> det_equal(...)`, not free hypotheses — Verus rightly rejected them. Repair: re-state the full antecedent inside `if (A) { ... }`, so every conjunct (kernel_l4_end, page_closure().remove(target_l2_p), mapping_2m/4k/1g, kernel_entries, r.0 == target_l2_p, r.1@.is_init(), r.1@.addr() == target_l2_p) becomes a hypothesis, then chain post1==pre==post2 per field with `=~=` to fire Map/Set/Seq extensionality and broadcast the PageTable wf-reveal lemmas to keep wf() observable when z3 unfolds the views.
